text: Return of Confidential Information Standard Clause Archive exception Return or Destruction of Confidential Information Obligation to Return or Destroy Subject to paragraph "ARCHIVE EXCEPTION", on the expiration or termination of this agreement, or on the disclosing party's request, the receiving party shall promptly return to the disclosing party all Confidential Information provided by the disclosing party, destroy all copies it made of Confidential Information, and if requested by the disclosing party, deliver to the disclosing party a certificate executed by the receiving party confirming compliance with the return or destruction obligation under this section. Archive Exception Comply With Law or Policy. The receiving party may retain an archival copy of the Confidential Information, to the extent necessary to comply with Law or archival policies. Remain Subject to Confidentiality Obligations. The receiving party shall continue to hold any Confidential Information retained under this section in confidence, subject to all confidentiality obligations under this agreement. Alternative Clauses Return or Destruction Return or Destruction of Confidential Information On the expiration or termination of this agreement, or on the disclosing party's request, the receiving party shall promptly return to the disclosing party all Confidential Information provided by the disclosing party, destroy all copies it made of Confidential Information, and if requested by the disclosing party, deliver to the disclosing party a certificate executed by the receiving party confirming compliance with the return or destruction obligation under this section.
